Quiet Title Hearing In Scd
Off Calendar Feb-28-2006 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Default Prove-Up/Quiet Title Hearing this day.
Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. RavinantaprichaE. Bura, CSR: Patrick Heard.
Andrew Heard, Esq. for Plaintiff: San Francisco Redevelopment Agency.
After hearing testimony and reviewing stipulations, exhibits, memo of points of authorities in support of the application for entry of judgment in file, Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff and against the Defaulted Defendant: All persons claiming any interest, or lien upon, the subject real property herein discribed in details in the four page judgment signed in open court, see scanned doc. for details
